title: lastrea cochleata
intro: Lastrea cochleata, also known as the Cochlea Fern, is a species of fern found in tropical Asia, particularly in India, China, and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Lastrea cochleata include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, while also being used as a natural remedy for wound healing and to reduce swelling. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
